person.name: Rhys Mechyll

memoryArtifacts.headline: Arms of House of Dinefwr. These arms were inherited by the Talbot family, later Earls of Shrewsbury.

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Rhys Mechyll (died 1244) was a Welsh prince of the House of Dinefwr, ruler of part of the kingdom of Deheubarth in southern Wales from 1234 to 1244. He was a son of Rhys Gryg (died 1234) ("Rhys the Hoarse"), son of Rhys ap Gruffydd (1132–1197), "The Lord Rhys", ruler of the kingdom of Deheubarth.

Marriage
He married Matilda de Braose (died 1248) who betrayed the dynasty's chief castle of Carreg Cennen to the Anglo-Normans in 1248, against the interests of her son Rhys. A Welsh chronicle, the Brut y Tywysogyon, records under the year 1248: "Rhys Fychan ap Rhys Mechyll regained the castle of Carreg Cennen, which his mother had treacherously placed in the power of the French, out of enmity for her son."

Progeny
He had a son Rhys Fychan (i.e. "The Younger") ap Rhys Mechyll, and a daughter Gwenllian, his eventual heiress who married Gilbert Talbot (died 1274), grandfather of Gilbert Talbot, 1st Baron Talbot (died 1345/6), to whom passed the ancient armorials of the House of Dinefwr, assumed as arms of alliance to a great princess in place of his own paternal arms.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Rhys Mechyll於1196年出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾利安代洛時，他的父親Prince Rhys Gryg31歲，母親Matilda de Clare17歲。他於1224年之前與Croft結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1244年在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾利安迪費桑特享年48歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯卡迪甘史爾斯特拉塔 福洛利達。

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘ardour’; borne in the Middle Ages by various rulers in south-west Wales, including  Rhys ap Tewdur  (  d. 1093 ) and  Rhys ap Gruffudd  (  1132–97 ).

variants.name: Reece
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Rhys . The name is now in widespread and frequent use outside Wales, in many cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the given name.

variants.name: Rees
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Welsh Rhys, in some cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the Welsh given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Rhys Mechyll was born in 1196, in Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Prince Rhys Gryg, was 31 and his mother, Matilda de Clare, was 17. He married Croft before 1224. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1244, in Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Strata Florida, Cardiganshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rhys Mechyll est né en 1196, à Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Prince Rhys Gryg, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Clare, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Croft avant 1224. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1244, à Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Strata Florida, Cardiganshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rhys Mechyll 1196 in Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Prince Rhys Gryg 31 und seine Mutter Matilda de Clare 17. Er hat vor 1224 Croft geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1244 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Strata Florida, Cardiganshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Croft prima del 1224. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1244, nel Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Strata Florida, Cardiganshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Rhys Mechyllが1196年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランデイロで生まれた時，父Prince Rhys Grygは31歳，母Matilda de Clareは17歳であった。1224年以前にCroftと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1244年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランディフエイサントで48歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズカーディガンシュアイアストラタ フロリダにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rhys Mechyll(이)가 1196년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 랜데이로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Prince Rhys Gryg(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda de Clare(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1224년 이전 Croft(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1244년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 랜디프이산트에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 카디건실르 스트라타 플로리다에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rhys Mechyll nasceu em 1196, em Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Prince Rhys Gryg, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Clare, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Croft antes 1224. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rhys Mechyll родился в 1196 г. в местности лландилоу, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Prince Rhys Gryg было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Clare, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Croft перед 1224 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1244 г. в местности лландифисант, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности страта флорида, кардиганьшир, Уэльс, Великобритания.
